titleStmt.title: SII 37.40: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 40. (A.R. No. 375 of 1938-39.) Ēlūrpāḍu, (hamlet of Gaṅganapalli), Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up against the wall of Chinna Subbayya house.
This is dated Śaka 1455, Prajōtpatti, Chaitra śu. 15 (wrong for Vijaya) corresponding to 1533 A.D., April 9, Wednesday.

It records the construction of a temple during the time of Achyutarāya by Eṟṟamreḍḍi, son of Eṟṟamreḍḍi Venkaṭareḍḍi and also maintainence of worship by the villagers (Gramasthulu). Further it records a grant of 3 varahās per month for offerings and worship in the temple and some land for the archaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī veṁkkaṭēśvara
svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka
varṣaṁbulu 1455 Agunēṭi prajōtpatti sa . ra
caitraśuddha 15 lu . śrīmadramāramaṇa mahavat
pratāpa vijayanagarādhīśvara Acyuta rāyalavāri
śakaṁlō vēlūrilō cērina gaṁgganapalle daggara yarraṁ
reḍḍi veṁkkaṭareḍḍi kumāruḍaina yarraṁreḍḍi śrī svāmi
dēvālayaṁ kaṭṭiṁci dēvuṇi taḷiha Akhaṁḍḍaṁ śukra
vārapuśāva māsūtsavālakugānu nela 1 ki ga 3
varahālunnu saṁvuvatsahetsavānaku ga 76
varahālūṁnnu dēvuṇiṁpūja cēśē Arccakuṇiki
tōṭamalicēnu 63 tūmuyīprakāraṁ saṁ
sdhānikula śalavu prakāraṁ grāmastulaynivāru
naḍipiṁccavalaśinadi . śrī . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 37.40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
